title: Un Kangal Kannaadi Lyrics Krishnaveni Panjalai Songs Lyrics
stanzas:
Singers: Raman Mahadevan, Shreya Ghoshal,
Renina Reddy
Movie: Krishnaveni Panjalai
Lyrics: Thamarai

Un kangal kannaadi nirkindren munnaadi
En binbam ennodu pesiyadhe
En kannil uloadi nee vandha pinnadi
Soppanam ovvondrum koosiyadhe

Thooram yaar koduththaar
Athai kuraiththaal yaar thadupaar?
Kaathal koor nagaththaal
Oru kaayam naervathai paar..

Azhaiyaadha virunthaali
Mazhaiyae mazhaiyae
Atharkaaga idai vanthu
Nuzhainthaal pizhaiye
Ithu poal oru naal
Ini vaaithidumo..?  (un kangal...)

Kanvizhithu kanvizhithu karugudhe
Imai urakkaththai varachcholli urugudhe
Kannadiththu kannadiththu sirikudhe
Sila ragasiya kanavugal muraikudhe..

Pookalin vaasam ellam
En mookidam thoarkiradhe
Nee varum paathaiyilthaan
En kaal kondu serkiradhe
Un koonthal ini iravaagum,
En kaigal athai pagalaakum

Un muththam miga uvarppakum..
En vetkam vanthu inippaakum
Kadal melae aadum padakile..
Karai šaera paarthu udayudhe.. (un kangal..)

Ethanai naal ippadiye irupathu
Indha boomiyai pol mudivindri poruppadhu
Karpooramaai ilamayum karaiyuthu
Oru kambiyillah kaaval-illah sirai idhu

Thoodhaai poi varuma
Pon megam paesiduma ?
Eeram un viralaai
En melae elludhiduma

Pesaamal unnai paarkaamal
Oru naalum manam thaangaadhe
Thaangaamal vizhi neer sindhi
Thozhmeedhu vandhu saaivene

Indha vaanam megam vazhthudho!!
Verum aasai kaati veelthudo!!  (Un kangal...)
Thooram yaar koduththaar
Athai kuraiththaal yaar thadupaar?
Kaathal koor nagaththaal
Oru kaayam naervathai paar..

Azhaiyaadha virundhaali
mazhaiyae mazhaiyae
Atharkaaga idai vanthu
nuzhainthaal pizhaiye
Ithu poal oru naal
ini vaaithidumo..?  (Un kangal...)

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Un Kangal Kannaadi, the protagonists express their deep emotions and reflections on love, as they navigate the complexities of their relationship. The song's soothing melody and heartfelt lyrics evoke a sense of nostalgia and longing, making it a perfect fit for romantic occasions. Set against the backdrop of Krishnaveni Panjalai, it captures the essence of love's beauty and challenges. The collaboration between Raman Mahadevan and Shreya Ghoshal adds a unique charm, making it a memorable piece in Tamil cinema.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Un Kangal Kannaadi from Krishnaveni Panjalai is a mesmerizing duet that beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. The enchanting voices of Raman Mahadevan and Shreya Ghoshal blend seamlessly, creating a soothing atmosphere that resonates with listeners. With Thamarai's poignant lyrics and N. R. Raghunanthan's melodious composition, this song is a must-listen for anyone who cherishes romantic melodies.
stanzaMeanings: I stand before you like a mirror with your eyes. My happiness doesn't speak to me. When you come into my eyes, there’s no dream left. Who has given this far away? If we talk about love, will it be a permanent truth?
Without being sad, the rain is falling. If it comes here, it will be a mistake. Will there be a day like this again? (your eyes...)
Seeing and seeing, it’s getting deeper. The dream of sleep is melting away. Watching and watching, it’s smiling. Some secret dreams are blooming...
The fragrance of flowers is filling my nose. You are coming on my path, holding my feet. Your curls will also become a night, my hands will hold it during the day.
Your kiss will be very sweet. My longing has come to this point. On the sea, the waves are dancing. Looking at the shore, it’s rising... (your eyes...)
How many days will this continue? This earth is not responsible for it. It’s like a dream, it’s getting lost. There’s no guard for this chain, it’s a prison.
Will the messenger come? Will the golden cloud speak? Will your tears fall on me?
Without speaking, without seeing you, my heart cannot bear even a day. Without bearing, my eyes are shedding tears, and I am losing myself.
Does this sky praise the clouds? Is it just showing desire? (your eyes...) Who has given this far away? If we talk about love, will it be a permanent truth?
Without being sad, the rain is falling. If it comes here, it will be a mistake. Will there be a day like this again? (your eyes...)
